hero.title: Blazing Fast Internet for East Jerusalem
hero.subtitle: Experience high-speed fiber connectivity with Coolnet

features.title: Why Choose  Coolnet
features.subTitle: Enjoy high speed, reliability, and effective support with Coolnet

speed.title: Consistent Speeds
speed.description: Treat yourself to a premium internet line for your peace of mind. Choose the plan that suits you from a range of options with consistent speeds to meet all your needs, plus many benefits you’ll only find with  Coolnet. Enjoy the best movies and matches.

field.title: Field Services
field.description: We’ve provided field teams to be at your side whenever you have a problem or need maintenance, ensuring your comfort and serving you with dedication.

security.title: Cyber Protection
security.description: Most importantly, your information’s security. That’s why with Coolnet, we provide the best protection methods to help prevent any cyber breach of your data or devices.

support.title: Professional Support
support.description: Since issues can always happen, we’ve set up a support center ready to answer any inquiry. Your time is valuable to us, so you won’t have to wait—we’ll be ready to take your call anytime.

value.title: Great Value
value.description: Affordable plans with no hidden fees.

plans.description: Choose the perfect plan for your home or business needs

speedTest.title: Internet Speed Test
speedTest.subtitle: Test your connection speed and get accurate measurements of your internet performance
speedTest.description: Test your connection speed and get accurate measurements of your internet performance
speedTest.infoLine1: Our speed test provides accurate measurements of your current internet connection performance.
speedTest.infoLine2: For best results, connect via ethernet cable and close other applications during the test.

info.title: About Speed Test
info.description1: Our speed test provides accurate measurements of your current internet connection performance.
info.description2: The test measures download speed, upload speed, ping (latency), and jitter (connection stability).
info.description3: For best results, connect via ethernet cable and close other applications during the test.

share.title: Share Speed Test Results
share.copiedDescription: Speed test results have been copied to your clipboard.

error.title: Test Failed
error.description: An error occurred while testing your connection. Please try again.

speedTest.seoDescription: Test your internet speed with Coolnet. Check your download and upload speeds.

5.description: Quantity: 1 PCS. The Nova EX12 is an AX3000 Whole Home Mesh Wi-Fi 6 System. It delivers solid Wi-Fi coverage for up to 7,000 ft². Includes four independent wireless amplifiers. Features beamforming technology for better performance.

6.description: Quantity: 2 PCS. AX3000 dual-band Wi-Fi 6 Mesh system. Enhanced performance and coverage. Great for medium-sized homes.

7.description: Quantity: 3 PCS. Best coverage and performance for large homes or offices. Powerful specs and high-speed dual-band. Ideal for multi-floor buildings.
